svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"03_curve_right","label":"Right sweep","topology":"Keep one continuous main road from B0 to T0; make it sweep broadly right in the foreground and ease back to the castle.","sockets":["B0","T0"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035}}}
